title: Scoping Workshop on E15 Use in California
content: CARB conducted a public workshop on October 14, to discuss introducing gasoline containing up to 15% ethanol (E15) in California. At this workshop, CARB staff provided an overview of the scientific evaluation of E15, current regulatory requirements, and concepts for potential regulatory updates as well as additional topics regarding the use of E15 in California.
author: Analysts Account
